# Security Policy

## Supported versions

Only the latest minor of each package is supported for security fixes.

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please report suspected security issues via [GitHub's private vulnerability reporting](https://docs.github.com/en/code-security/security-advisories/guidance-on-reporting-and-writing-information-about-vulnerabilities/privately-reporting-a-security-vulnerability) rather than a public issue.

I'll acknowledge within 72 hours and aim for a fix or mitigation within 14 days for high-severity issues.
